title: coelogyne longicaulis
intro: Coelogyne longicaulis, also known as the Coelogyne longicaulis orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne longicaulis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne longicaulis is often used in tea or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
